seoTitle: Delete a Team or Group in Microsoft Teams Safely
metaDescription: Permanently delete a team workspace in Microsoft Teams, understand what gets wiped, and use the 30-day recovery window if you change your mind.
intro: Deleting a team in Microsoft Teams removes far more than just a sidebar entry — it wipes connected files, channels, and chat logs across your Microsoft 365 environment. This guide walks through the deletion steps and explains the safety net Microsoft provides if you need to recover it.

steps.heading: Confirm you have owner rights
steps.body: You need Team Owner status or administrator privileges to delete a team, so verify your permissions before starting.

steps.heading: Locate the team
steps.body: Find the target team in your left-hand Teams sidebar list.

steps.heading: Open the deletion menu
steps.body: Click the three-dot more options icon next to the team name and select Delete Team from the dropdown.

steps.heading: Confirm the warning
steps.body: Read the warning about lost channels, files, and chat logs, then check the confirmation box acknowledging the wipe.

steps.heading: Finalize the delete
steps.body: Click the Delete Team confirmation button, which removes the group from all member lists immediately.

faq.question: Can I recover a team after deleting it?
faq.answer: Yes, Microsoft 365 typically retains deleted teams for a 30-day administrative recovery window before permanent removal.

faq.question: What happens to the SharePoint files linked to the team?
faq.answer: Deleting a team also removes the connected SharePoint site and its files, subject to the same recovery window.

faq.question: Do I need to be an IT administrator to delete a team?
faq.answer: No, being the Team Owner is enough — though system administrators can also delete teams they don't own.

faq.question: Is deleting a personal or community group the same process?
faq.answer: No, personal or community Microsoft groups are removed through separate mobile drawer shortcuts rather than the standard team deletion menu.
